question: Why did our Class-A office NOI underperform pro-forma by 22% in the Sunbelt this quarter, while Midwest held?
metric_label: NOI attribution by asset class, metro, and quarter

upstream_models.description: Net Operating Income by property and month from Yardi Voyager. Includes actual NOI, pro-forma NOI, and variance. Partitioned by asset class and metro.
Rent roll snapshot from VTS. Includes WALT, base rent, market rent, expiry date, and tenant_id. Source of WALT compression signals.
Tenant move-in, move-out, renewal, and churn events from MRI Software. Includes churn_reason and re_lease_market_flag for attribution.
Property master with asset class, metro code, sub-market, year-built, and pro-forma assumptions. Joins to all fact tables for Sunbelt vs. Midwest segmentation.
